data.content:
# Implementation Plan: NDJSON Streaming Output for kno ls

## Overview
Add a --stream flag to kno ls that writes one JSON object per line (NDJSON format) with stdout flushing after each line. This enables pipe consumers to process results incrementally.

## Files to Change

### 1. src/cli.rs - Add --stream flag to ListArgs
- Add stream: bool field to ListArgs struct with long --stream
- Help text: Stream results as one JSON object per line (NDJSON).
- Complexity: trivial (2 lines)

### 2. src/run_commands.rs - Branch streaming vs buffered path in run_ls
- After applying filters, if args.stream is true, call a new stream_ndjson function
- The streaming path iterates the filtered Vec, serializes each knot as compact JSON, writes via writeln!, and calls flush() after each line
- Emit final metadata line: {"_meta":true,"total":N,"complete":true}
- If args.stream is false, fall through to existing args.json / text path
- The --stream flag implies JSON format (no need to also pass --json)
- Complexity: moderate (~15 lines to add dispatch)

### 3. New file: src/stream_output.rs - NDJSON writer
- pub fn stream_ndjson_knots(knots: Vec<KnotView>) -> Result<(), AppError>
- Acquires a BufWriter<Stdout> lock, iterates knots, serializes each with serde_json::to_string (compact), writes with writeln!, and flushes after each line
- Emits terminal metadata line with _meta, total, and complete fields
- All errors mapped to AppError
- Complexity: ~35 lines

### 4. src/main.rs - Register new module
- Add mod stream_output; to module declarations
- Complexity: trivial (1 line)

### 5. Tests
- Unit test in src/stream_output.rs: verify output format, metadata line, flush behavior
- Integration test in run_commands_tests: verify end-to-end with stream flag

## Architecture Decisions
1. No iterator-based refactor of list_knots(): streaming benefit is on output side, not query side
2. --stream implies JSON: no need for both --stream and --json
3. Compact JSON per line: serde_json::to_string (not to_string_pretty)
4. BufWriter with explicit flush after each writeln!
5. Metadata line: {"_meta":true,"total":N,"complete":true}

## Complexity: Low-moderate. ~50 LOC production, ~60 LOC tests. No changes to data model or existing paths.
